seo.title: Ergo vs Bitcoin, Ethereum, Cardano — Full Comparison | Ergo
seo.description: Compare Ergo to Bitcoin, Ethereum, Cardano, Monero & more. Side-by-side analysis of consensus, smart contracts, privacy & tokenomics.
seo.keywords: ergo comparison, ergo vs bitcoin, ergo vs ethereum, blockchain comparison, ergo vs cardano, ergo vs monero, cryptocurrency comparison, best blockchain

collection.name: Ergo Blockchain Comparisons
collection.description: Comprehensive comparisons of Ergo with other major blockchain platforms including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Cardano, Monero, and more.

items.question: Is Ergo better than Ethereum?
items.answer: Ergo and Ethereum serve different purposes. Ergo uses eUTXO model which is MEV-resistant (no front-running), has predictable fees (~$0.01), and is more secure for DeFi. Ethereum has larger ecosystem and more developers.

hub.title: Ergo vs The World
hub.subtitle: 了解Ergo 如何与其他区块链平台进行比较。诚实、技术比较与无营销流量。

visualSection.title: 可视化对比与矩阵
visualSection.subtitle: Ergo vs 其他 L1 的对照图，便于保存与分享。

hub.whyMattersSubtitle: 每个区块链都会进行交易。了解这些交易有助于您选择合适的工具来满足您的需要。
hub.securityFirstDesc: Ergo的 eUTXO 模型消除了影响基于账户的链的所有类型的脆弱性。
hub.fairLaunchDesc: 没有ICO、无预设、无VC分配。所有ERG都是通过采矿赚取的，如比特币。
hub.programmablePrivacyDesc: Sigma 协议启用了不受信任的零知识验证，并将其建立在核心协议中。
hub.readyToBuildDesc: 加入建设者社区，创造分散融资的未来。
